text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
When I noticed your light on, I didn't want to
believe you'd still be awake, yet here we are.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
You're looking awfully pale. Have you been
getting enough rest?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Riko Kashimoto—an executive member of the
URA currently employed by Tracen Academy—is
suddenly standing beside me.
choice_data_list: I've been a little busy lately...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
What would the students think if you, a trainer,
were to collapse from exhaustion? You should be
more mindful of your position.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her warning is harsh, but I can't help noticing she
must have also just finished a rough day of work.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Well... I suppose I'm in no position to scold others
for working late today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We head out of the office while sharing some
notes and information with each other.
